title: Dasyphyllum popayanense
taxonomy: Dasyphyllum popayanense is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Dasyphyllum and is a type of shrub native to South America. The species is further classified into the family of daisy and sunflower-like plants. Dasyphyllum popayanense is a relatively rare and lesser-known plant species. It is often studied in the context of its unique characteristics and adaptations within the Asteraceae family.
